Description:
*Feature:* user login

*Preconditions:*
Invalid password (e.g., too short, too long, contains special characters)

*Test Steps:*
Enter invalid password: password1234
Click 'Login' button.
Verify an error message is displayed indicating invalid password.
Check for appropriate error handling.

*Risk Reasoning:* Password complexity is critical; failure could compromise account security.
Acceptance Criteria: An error message is displayed indicating invalid password.

Summary: [Negative|Boundary|Edge Case] Concurrent Login - Attempt to Login with Same Password
Description:
*Feature:* user login

*Preconditions:*
Multiple users attempting to login with the same password.

*Test Steps:*
Enter password: password123
Attempt to login with the same password as another user.
Verify the system prevents login and displays an error.
Check for appropriate error handling.

*Risk Reasoning:* Potential for security vulnerabilities if duplicate passwords are not handled correctly.
Acceptance Criteria: The system prevents login and displays an error message indicating duplicate password.

Description:
*Feature:* user login

*Preconditions:*
Invalid email format (e.g., missing @ or domain)

*Test Steps:*
Enter invalid email address: test@example.com (missing @ or domain)
Click 'Login' button.
Verify an error message is displayed indicating invalid email format.
Check for appropriate error handling.

*Risk Reasoning:* Invalid email format could lead to security vulnerabilities or incorrect user data.
Acceptance Criteria: An error message is displayed indicating the email format is invalid.

Description:
*Feature:* user login

*Preconditions:*
User is valid, valid email and password.

*Test Steps:*
Enter valid email address: test@example.com
Enter valid password: password123
Click 'Login' button.
Verify successful login with user profile displayed.
Check for correct user profile displayed.

*Risk Reasoning:* Successful login is a core functionality; failure could lead to unauthorized access.
Acceptance Criteria: User is successfully logged in and redirected to the user's dashboard.

Description:
*Feature:* user login

*Preconditions:*
Empty email address.

*Test Steps:*
Enter empty email address:  
Click 'Login' button.
Verify an error message is displayed indicating the email is required.
Check for appropriate error handling.

*Risk Reasoning:* Missing email address is a critical requirement; failure could prevent login.
Acceptance Criteria: An error message is displayed indicating the email is required.

Description:
*Feature:* user login

*Preconditions:*
Password length is less than 8 characters.

*Test Steps:*
Enter minimum password length: 6
Click 'Login' button.
Verify the login process is completed successfully.
Check for appropriate error handling.

*Risk Reasoning:* Ensuring the system handles short passwords gracefully.
Acceptance Criteria: Login proceeds successfully with the minimum password length.

Description:
*Feature:* user login

*Preconditions:*
Password length is greater than 32 characters.

*Test Steps:*
Enter maximum password length: 32
Click 'Login' button.
Verify the login process is completed successfully.
Check for appropriate error handling.

*Risk Reasoning:* Ensuring the system handles long passwords gracefully.
Acceptance Criteria: Login proceeds successfully with the maximum password length.

Summary: [Edge Case] Edge Case - Invalid Email Domain
Description:
*Feature:* user login

*Preconditions:*
Invalid email domain (e.g., missing @)

*Test Steps:*
Enter invalid email address: test@example.com (missing @)
Click 'Login' button.
Verify an error message is displayed indicating invalid email format.
Check for appropriate error handling.

*Risk Reasoning:* Invalid email domain could lead to incorrect user data.
Acceptance Criteria: An error message is displayed indicating invalid email format.
